hero.description: PT Kerta Rahayu Cikal Persada integrates multi-sector excellence—from agriculture to infrastructure—driving sustainable growth and unparalleled commercial value.

overview.title: Empowering Indonesia's Core Industries
overview.description: As a dynamic, multi-faceted conglomerate, PT KERTA RAHAYU CIKAL PERSADA is dedicated to advancing the foundational industries of tomorrow. We don't just operate; we integrate systems to build resilience.

features.title: Certified Quality
features.desc: Adhering to the highest operational standards.

list.title: Agriculture & Forestry
list.desc: Sustainable cultivation of spices, aromatic crops, and refreshing plants for global markets.

list.title: Manufacturing Industry
list.desc: High-quality textile garments and state-of-the-art essential oil distillery operations.

list.title: Construction
list.desc: End-to-end development of robust conventional infrastructure and residential complexes.

list.title: Wholesale Trade
list.desc: Extensive distribution networks for food, vehicles, hardware machinery, and basic goods.

list.title: Transport & Storage
list.desc: Professional management of large-scale, automated warehouse receipt systems.

list.title: Accomodation & Catering
list.desc: Premium, flexible event and specialized food catering services.

values.title: Built on Integrity, Driven by Innovation
values.description: Our approach combines traditional values with modern operational efficiencies ensuring long-term profitability and sustainable outcomes.

list.title: Commitment to Quality
list.text: Every product sourced or manufactured undergoes rigorous quality assurance to meet global standards.

list.title: Resource Efficiency
list.text: Operating smartly in agriculture and manufacturing to ensure minimal waste and maximal sustainability.

list.title: On-Time Delivery
list.text: With robust warehousing and fleet logistics, we guarantee structural delivery timelines across all trade sectors.

cta.title: Ready to Collaborate?
cta.description: Discover how PT Kerta Rahayu Cikal Persada can add definitive value to your supply chain, real estate ventures, or business operations.
